en: Can you understand fast English? Guess which sentence I'm saying. I'm so tired,.
ko: 빠른 영어를 알아들을 수 있어? 내가 어떤 문장을 말하는지 맞춰봐
ja: 速い英語を聞き取れますか？どの文を言っているか当ててみて。とても疲れた。
zhTW: 你能聽懂快速英語嗎？猜猜我在說哪句話。I'm so tired，
vi: Ban co the hieu tieng Anh nhanh khong? Doan xem toi dang noi cau nao. I'm so tired,

en: But I need to work today. I'm so tired, but I need to work today. Which word did I say? Three,.
ko: I'm so tired but I need to work today. 너무 피곤한데 오늘 일해야 해. 어떤
ja: でも今日は仕事しなきゃ。I'm so tired, but I need to work today. どの単語を言った？3、
zhTW: 但我今天需要工作。I'm so tired, but I need to work today. 我說的是哪個字？三、
vi: nhung toi can lam viec hom nay. I'm so tired, but I need to work today. Toi noi tu nao? Ba,

en: Two, one. I'm so tired, but I need to work today. Work sounds like E-R, work, work.
ko: I'm so tired but I need to work today. 너무 피곤한데 오늘 일해야 해. 어떤
ja: 2、1。I'm so tired, but I need to work today. workはE-Rのように聞こえます。work、work。
zhTW: 二、一。I'm so tired, but I need to work today. Work聽起來像E-R，work，work。
vi: hai, mot. I'm so tired, but I need to work today. Work nghe nhu E-R, work, work.

en: What about this word? Well, we can say walk, walk. The L is silent. I need to walk today.
ko: 이 단어는 어때? 음, walk, walk라고 할 수 있어. L은 발음 안 해. 오늘 걸어야 해.
ja: この単語はどう？walk、walk。Lは無声です。I need to walk today。
zhTW: 那這個字呢？嗯，我們可以說walk，walk。L是不發音的。I need to walk today。
vi: Con tu nay thi sao? Chung ta co the noi walk, walk. Chu L khong phat am. I need to walk today.

ja: チャンネル登録でもっと英語レッスンを。
zhTW: 訂閱以獲得更多英語課程。
vi: Dang ky de xem them cac bai hoc tieng Anh.
